title: hieracium subramosum subsp. tynnotrichum
intro: Hieracium subramosum subsp. tynnotrichum, also known as hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Hieracium subramosum subsp. tynnotrichum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant are often dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
